metadata.description: BioOKF: the BioOKF Studio GUI + MCP server + CLI for curating, visualizing, and reasoning over biomedical Open Knowledge Format knowledge bases.

plugins.name: biookf
plugins.description: Curate, visualize, and reason over BioOKF knowledge bases. Ships the bokf MCP server (curation + analysis + live Studio GUI control), the bokf CLI, and the prebuilt BioOKF Studio desktop app, with no local compile required.
